emails.subject: Enron mess
emails.body: Enron mess The more I read and hear you should be ashamed.

emails.subject: Re: Enron mess
emails.body: Re: Enron mess How so. I have tried my best over the years to improve deal quality to an audience that usually told me that I was irrelevant. Suggest you get facts before judging anyone. Rick Rick Buy Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Enron mess
emails.body: RE: Enron mess You didn't say no to their bad deals and you took their money so you are guilty by omission. As far as being judgmental, I will leave that up to the SEC, Justice Dept. and ultimately God. To: Leach, Doug
